chapters.titleZh: 第一回 史南湘制谱选名花 梅子玉闻香惊绝艳
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 1 — Shi Nanxiang compiles a floral register of celebrated beauties; Mei Ziyu, catching their fragrance, is stunned by peerless allure.

chapters.titleZh: 第二回 魏聘才途中夸遇美 王桂保席上乱飞花
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 2 — Wei Pincai boasts of encounters with beauties along the road; Wang Guibao sends flowers flying in riot at the feast.

chapters.titleZh: 第三回 卖烟壶老王索诈 砸菜碗小旦撒娇
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 3 — Old Wang the snuff-bottle seller attempts extortion; a young dan shatters dishes in coquettish protest.

chapters.titleZh: 第四回 三名士雪窗分咏 一少年粉壁题词
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 4 — Three scholars compose by a snowy window; a young man inscribes a lyric on a powder-white wall.

chapters.titleZh: 第五回 袁宝珠引进杜琴言 富三爷细述华公子
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 5 — Yuan Baozhu introduces Du Qinyan; Third Master Fu gives a detailed account of Lord Hua.

chapters.titleZh: 第六回 颜夫人快订良姻 梅公子初观色界
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 6 — Madam Yan swiftly settles an excellent marriage match; Young Master Mei first surveys the realm of beauty.

chapters.titleZh: 第七回 颜仲清最工一字对 史南湘独出五言诗
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 7 — Yan Zhongqing excels at one-character antitheses; Shi Nanxiang uniquely produces five-character verse.

chapters.titleZh: 第八回 偷复偷戏园失银两 乐中乐酒馆闹皮杯
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 8 — Theater thieves steal silver yet again; amid merriment at the wine shop, disorder erupts.

chapters.titleZh: 第九回 月夕灯宵万花齐放 珠情琴思一面缘悭
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 9 — At moonlit Lantern Night, flowers blaze in full bloom; amid pearl-like passion and qin-like yearning, one meeting is missed.

chapters.titleZh: 第十回 春梦婆娑情长情短 花枝约略疑假疑真
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 10 — Spring dreams swirl between long and short affections; floral figures appear half-true, half-doubtful.

chapters.titleZh: 第十一回 三佳人妙语翻新 交婢女戏言受责
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 11 — Three beauties turn language into fresh brilliance; maidservants are rebuked over playful talk.

chapters.titleZh: 第十二回 颜仲清婆心侠气 田春航傲骨痴情
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 12 — Yan Zhongqing's chivalrous heart reveals elder compassion; Tian Chunhang's proud bones expose obsessive devotion.

chapters.titleZh: 第十三回 两心巧印巨眼深情 一味歪缠淫魔色鬼
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 13 — Two hearts secretly imprint deep feeling; lustful demons and lecherous ghosts continue crooked entanglements.

chapters.titleZh: 第十四回 古诵七言琴声复奏 字搜四子酒令新翻
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 14 — Ancient heptasyllabics are recited as qin melodies return; a drinking game is innovated from four selected characters.

chapters.titleZh: 第十五回 老学士奉命出差 佳公子闲情访素
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 15 — The old scholar is appointed to official duty away from home; the noble young master idly seeks his beloved.

chapters.titleZh: 第十六回 魏聘才初进华公府 梅子玉再访杜琴言
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 16 — Wei Pincai first enters Lord Hua's mansion; Mei Ziyu again visits Du Qinyan.

chapters.titleZh: 第十七回 祝芳年琼筵集词客 评花谱国色冠群香
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 17 — At Zhu Fangnian's banquet, poets gather in splendor; in the floral register, supreme beauty crowns all fragrance.

chapters.titleZh: 第十八回 狎客楼中教蔑片 妖娼门口唱杨枝
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 18 — In a pleasure house, tricks are taught for exploiting performers; at a courtesan's door, willow songs are sung.

chapters.titleZh: 第十九回 春述淫邪奸谋藏木桶 逞智慧妙语骗金箍
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 19 — Lewd plots and treachery hide within the wooden barrel; clever speech and quick wit deceive for gain.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十回 夺锦标龙舟竞渡 闷酒令鸳侣传觞
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 20 — Dragon boats race for the championship; paired lovers pass cups through a playful wine game.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十一回 造谣言徒遭冷眼 问衷曲暗泣同心
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 21 — Rumor-making wins only cold contempt; true feelings are confessed in hidden tears.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十二回 遇灾星素琴双痛哭 逛运河梅杜再联情
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 22 — Under an unlucky star, plain hearts weep in double grief; touring the canal, Mei and Du renew their bond.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十三回 裹草帘阿呆遭毒手 坐粪车劣幕述淫心
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 23 — A-Dai is attacked by poisoners under a grass mat; riding a night-soil cart, a vile secretary reveals depraved intent.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十四回 说新闻传来新戏 定情品跳出情关
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 24 — News of a new opera spreads; in fixing terms of affection, one leaps free from emotional bondage.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十五回  水榭风廓花能解语 清歌妙舞玉自生香
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 25 — At waterside pavilions and wind galleries, flowers seem to speak; clear songs and subtle dances let jade-like grace arise.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十六回 进谗言聘才酬宿怨 重国色华府购名花
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 26 — Slander is advanced to satisfy old grudges; valuing beauty above all, Lord Hua purchases celebrated performers.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十七回 奚正绅大闹秋水堂 杜琴言避祸华公府
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 27 — Xi Zhengshen makes a violent disturbance at Qiushui Hall; Du Qinyan seeks refuge in Lord Hua's mansion.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十八回 生离别隐语寄牵牛 昧天良贪心学扁马
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 28 — At parting, hidden words are sent through the Morning Glory; blinded by greed, one learns petty and crooked tricks.

chapters.titleZh: 第二十九回 缺月重圆真情独笑 群珠紧守离恨谁怜
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 29 — A broken moon rounds again and true feeling smiles alone; in strict seclusion among pearls, who can pity divided longing?

chapters.titleZh: 第三十回 赏灯月开宴品群花 试容装上台呈艳曲
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 30 — Under moonlit lanterns, a banquet appraises the flowers; in trial costume and makeup, a brilliant stage piece is presented.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十一回 解余酲群花留夜月 萦旧感名士唱秋坟
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 31 — After drink, the flowers keep the night moon in lingering company; old sorrow returns as scholars sing of autumn graves.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十二回 众名士萧斋等报捷 老司官冷署判呈词
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 32 — In Xiao's studio, celebrated men await examination news; in a cold yamen office, a minor official adjudicates petitions.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十三回 寄家书梅学使训子 馈赆仪华公子辞宾
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 33 — Inspector Mei sends a family letter instructing his son; Young Master Hua bids farewell and dismisses his guests.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十四回 还宿债李元茂借钱 闹元宵魏聘才被窃
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 34 — To repay debts, Li Yuanmao borrows money; during Lantern festivities, Wei Pincai is robbed.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十五回 集葩经飞花生并蒂 裁艳曲红豆掷相思
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 35 — In collecting floral classics, twin blossoms arise from one stem; in crafting lyric airs, red beans cast lovesick longing.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十六回 小谈心众口骂珊枝 中奸计奋身碎玉镯
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 36 — In intimate talk, all mouths curse Shanzhi; amid treacherous scheming, a jade bracelet is smashed in anger.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十七回 行小令一字化为三 对戏名二言增至四
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 37 — In a minor game, one character transforms into three; in theater-title antiphony, two words expand into four.

chapters.titleZh: 第三八回 论真赝注释神禹碑 数灾祥驳翻太乙数
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 38 — On authenticity and forgery, annotations debate the Divine Yu stele; on omen counting, Taiyi numerology is refuted.

chapters.titleZh: 第三十九回 闹新房灵机生雅谑 装假发白首变红颜
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 39 — In wedding-chamber revelry, quick wit yields elegant jokes; with false hair arranged, white locks become youthful color.

chapters.titleZh: 第四十回 奚老土淫毒成天阉 潘其观恶报作风臀
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 40 — Xi the rustic libertine is poisoned by lust and rendered a eunuch; Pan Qiguan receives retribution through a degrading affliction.

chapters.titleZh: 第四一回 惜芳春蝴蝶皆成梦 按艳拍鸳鸯不羡仙
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 41 — Cherishing spring, all butterflies turn to dreams; beating erotic rhythms, paired mandarin ducks envy no immortals.

chapters.titleZh: 第四二回 索养赡师娘勒价 打茶围幕友破财
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 42 — A guardian extorts support fees at inflated rates; in tea-house rounds, a parasite loses his money.

chapters.titleZh: 第四三回 苏蕙芳慧心瞒寡妇 徐子云重价赎琴言
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 43 — Su Huifang uses keen wit to outmaneuver the widow; Xu Ziyun redeems Qinyan at great expense.

chapters.titleZh: 第四四回 听谣言三家人起衅 见恶札两公子绝交
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 44 — Listening to rumors, three households erupt in conflict; seeing vicious letters, two young masters sever ties.

chapters.titleZh: 第四五回 佳公子踏月访情人 美玉郎扶乩认义父
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 45 — A noble youth visits his beloved by moonlight; the jade-like gentleman receives spirit-writing and recognizes an adoptive father.

chapters.titleZh: 第四六回 众英才分题联集锦 老名士制序笔生花
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 46 — Talented men divide topics and compose linked brilliance; an elder master writes a preface and lets his brush bloom with flowers.

chapters.titleZh: 第四七回 奚十一奇方修肾 潘其观忍辱医臀
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 47 — Xi Eleven seeks a bizarre remedy to strengthen his kidneys; Pan Qiguan endures humiliation while treating his injured backside.

chapters.titleZh: 第四八回 木兰艇吟出断肠词 皇华亭痛洒离情泪
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 48 — On a magnolia boat, a heartbroken lyric is sung; at Huanghua Pavilion, tears are shed in painful farewell.

chapters.titleZh: 第四九回 爱中慕田状元求婚 意外情许三姐认弟
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 49 — Moved by love, Scholar Tian seeks marriage as top laureate; by chance affection, Third Sister Xu recognizes her lost brother.

chapters.titleZh: 第五十回 改戏文林春喜正谱 娶妓女魏聘才收场
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 50 — Lin Chunxi revises opera texts into proper form; Wei Pincai's story closes with his marriage to a courtesan.

chapters.titleZh: 第五一回 闹缝穷隔墙听戏 舒积忿同室操戈
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 51 — In poverty and frustration, people eavesdrop on opera through walls; pent-up resentment breaks into open conflict indoors.

chapters.titleZh: 第五二回 群公子花园贺喜 众佳人绣阁陪新
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 52 — Young masters celebrate in the garden; beautiful ladies accompany the newlyweds in embroidered chambers.

chapters.titleZh: 第五三回 桃花扇题曲定芳情 燕子矶痴魂惊幻梦
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 53 — By inscribing songs on a peach-blossom fan, fragrant affection is sealed; at Swallow Bluff, an infatuated soul is shocked by a phantom dream.

chapters.titleZh: 第五四回 才子词科登翰苑 佳人绣阁论唐诗
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 54 — A talented scholar enters the Hanlin through lyric examination; in the ladies' chamber, beauties discuss Tang poetry.

chapters.titleZh: 第五五回 凤凰山下谒骚坛 翡翠巢边寻旧冢
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 55 — At Phoenix Mountain they pay respects to a literary altar; beside Emerald Nest they seek an old tomb.

chapters.titleZh: 第五六回 屈方正成神托梦 侯太史假义恤孤
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 56 — Qu Fangzheng appears in a dream after becoming a god; Historian Hou feigns righteousness in aiding an orphan.

chapters.titleZh: 第五七回 袁绮香酒令戏群芳 王琼华诗牌作盟主
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 57 — Yuan Qixiang leads drinking-game banter among beauties; Wang Qionghua becomes alliance leader through poetry cards.

chapters.titleZh: 第五八回 奚十一主仆遭恶报 潘其观夫妇闹淫魔
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 58 — Xi Eleven and his servant suffer karmic retribution; Pan Qiguan and his wife descend into obscene turmoil.

chapters.titleZh: 第五九回 梅侍郎独建屈公祠 屈少君重返都门地
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 59 — Vice-Minister Mei independently builds the Qu shrine; Young Master Qu returns to the capital.

chapters.titleZh: 第六十回 金吉甫归结品花鉴 袁宝珠领袖祝文星
chapters.titleEn: Chapter 60 — Jin Jifu brings Pinhua Baojian to its conclusion; Yuan Baozhu leads the invocation honoring the literary stars.
